title: UnifaceEntity.setOccurrenceField
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceEntity.setOccurrenceField Insert new contents into the specified field. Explain this code import com.rocketsoftware.uniface.jci.*; void setOccurrenceField (int occNumber,int fieldNumber,Object object); Copy Parameters occNumber Number of the occurrence. fieldNumber Required field’s number. object New contents for the field specified by occNumber and fieldNumber . Return Values None. The method setOccurrenceField throws a UnifaceException if the occurrence or field numbers are out of range, or if a data type conversion error occurs for the obj parameter.
